message:
🌱 Add fluent-bit: out_cloudwatch_logs: log_group_class option introduced mission (#1803)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "fluent-bit-8949-out-cloudwatch-logs-log-group-class-option-introduced-breaking-c",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "fluent-bit: out_cloudwatch_logs: log_group_class option introduced breaking change in 3.0.7",
+    "description": "out_cloudwatch_logs: log_group_class option introduced breaking change in 3.0.7. This issue affects 10+ users.",
+    "type": "upgrade",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify fluent-bit upgrade symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your fluent-bit deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit -n fluent-bit --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review fluent-bit configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant fluent-bit configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit\nkubectl get configmap -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluent-bit\n```\n## Bug Report\n\nRelease 3.0.7 delivered the new log_group_class option support for cloudwatch output, but this introduces a breaking change, causing fluentbit not able to start."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for out_cloudwatch_logs: log_group_class option introduced…",
+        "description": "Since release 3.0.7 `auto_create_group` couldn't be set to Off anymore. That was a breaking change.\n\nI didn't see any reason why `log_group_class_type` and `log_group_class` should be set, as they're not used when `[auto_]create_group` is off.\n\nPlease review  \n\n----\nEnter `[N/A]` in the box, if an\n```yaml\n[2024/06/12 00:07:27] [error] [output:cloudwatch_logs:cloudwatch_logs.0] Configuring log_group_class requires `auto_create_group On`.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm out_cloudwatch_logs: log_group_class option… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit -n fluent-bit --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n fluent-bit --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Since release 3.0.7 `auto_create_group` couldn't be set to Off anymore. That was a breaking change.\n\nI didn't see any reason why `log_group_class_type` and `log_group_class` should be set, as they're not used when `[auto_]create_group` is off.\n\nPlease review  \n\n----\nEnter `[N/A]` in the box, if an item is not applicable to your change.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[2024/06/12 00:07:27] [error] [output:cloudwatch_logs:cloudwatch_logs.0] Configuring log_group_class requires `auto_create_group On`.",
+        "[OUTPUT]\n    Name cloudwatch_logs\n    Match *\n    region us-west-2\n    log_group_name XXX\n    log_stream_prefix XXX\n    auto_create_group Off"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "fluent-bit",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "fluent-bit"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit/issues/8949",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit/pull/9114"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 5,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with fluent-bit installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-28T06:29:03.025Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,

+  }
+}
